summary: CRE Workflow Testing Complete - All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend fully functional with CRE Board, New Deals tab, Convert to Project dialog, Create Project dialog, and GM Dashboard features all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: CRE endpoints properly check for CRE or SUPER_ADMIN role
Convert deal endpoint correctly requires accountant_confirmed: true
db.leads collection used consistently (fixed from db.crm_leads)
secrets import added for project ID generation
Sidebar.jsx includes CRE Board link for 'cre' and 'super_admin' roles
seed_data_creation: New deals present: 'Test CRE Client' and 'Mr Vinoth' with HasRE badge
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRE workflow fully functional. CRE user (Anita Desai) can: 1) View New Deals from Sales on New Deals tab, 2) Click 'Convert to Project' to collect advance payment and create project, 3) Create projects manually via Create Project dialog, 4) View dashboard metrics and project stages. GM Dashboard working with Planning tab showing RE Projects.

cre_login_redirect.details: CRE user redirects directly to /cre-board after login

cre_board_display.details: CRE Board shows header, dashboard metrics (Draft/Pending Payment/Payment Received/In Planning/Approved), workflow banner, payment collection requests, total ongoing projects (2), total value (₹60,00,000)

new_deals_tab.details: GET /api/cre/new-deals returns closed deals from Sales. UI shows 2 new deals with 'Convert to Project' buttons

convert_deal_endpoint.details: POST /api/cre/convert-deal/{lead_id} correctly requires accountant_confirmed:true. Returns 400 without confirmation, 404 for invalid lead

convert_deal_dialog.details: Dialog shows client info, advance amount input, payment mode select, payment reference, accountant verification checkbox

create_project_dialog.details: All fields present: Project Name, Client Name, Phone, Email, Location, Square Feet, Building Type, Package selection (A/B/C), Advance Payment Details (required)

cre_dashboard_api.details: GET /api/cre/dashboard returns metrics. Permission correctly denied to non-CRE users (403)

cre_payment_requests_api.details: GET /api/cre/payment-requests returns payment stages for collection

cre_projects_all_api.details: GET /api/cre/projects/all returns list of CRE projects

gm_approval_endpoint.details: PATCH /api/approvals/projects/{project_id}/gm-approve endpoint exists and accepts PATCH method (no Method Not Allowed error)

sidebar_cre_board_link.details: Sidebar.jsx includes CRE Board link for 'cre' and 'super_admin' roles at /cre-board

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/cre/new-deals: PASS - Returns closed deals from Sales
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/cre/convert-deal/{lead_id}: PASS - Validates accountant_confirmed, returns 404 for invalid lead

ui_elements_verified.cre_board_header: CRE Board - Client Relationship & Project Onboarding
ui_elements_verified.metric_cards: Draft (0), Pending Payment (0), Payment Received (0), In Planning (1), Approved (1)
ui_elements_verified.workflow_banner: Draft → Submit for Payment → Accountant Verifies → Payment Received → Send to Planning
ui_elements_verified.payment_collection_requests: 28 payment collection requests with Collect buttons
ui_elements_verified.project_stages: Drawing Stage (0), Yet to Start (1), Foundation (0), Basement (0), SS-Brick Work (0), SS-Plastering (0), Finishing (0), Handover (0)
ui_elements_verified.tabs: New Deals (2), All Projects, Draft, Pending Payment, Payment Received, In Planning, Approved
ui_elements_verified.new_deal_items: Test CRE Client (New Deal), Mr Vinoth (New Deal, Has RE)
